articles.title: Market Analysts Predict Ether Bearish Continuation That Could Crash Ethereum To $750
articles.description: Bearish sentiments for Ether (ETH), the native token of the Ethereum blockchain, continues to build up. ETH is currently trading around its July low of around $1,290, a level that analysts expect prices to fall from to between $750-$850 in the coming months.
